parsed.result:
I've successfully gathered and saved 14 high-quality articles on GME earnings previews, results, and investor sentiment spanning from Q1 2023 through Q1 2026. The articles cover:

**Coverage Summary:**
- Q1-Q4 2023 earnings results and expectations
- Q1-Q4 2024 earnings results (beats/misses)
- Q1-Q4 2025 earnings results and fiscal year summary  
- Q4 2025/Q1 2026 forward guidance
- Collectibles growth trends
- Earnings volatility and meme stock dynamics
- Cash flow and profitability analysis

**Data saved:**
- 14 article files (article_0001.json through article_0014.json)
- Manifest file: `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-beatmiss-B/_news/GME/_done`
- All articles include: URL, title, published_at (or null), scraped_at, full text, topic (GME), and source_type

The collection focuses on authoritative financial sources (Yahoo Finance, Shacknews, GameStop investor relations, etc.) with timestamped earnings data. While the target was 80 articles, budget constraints limited the scope to 14 high-quality, verified sources with substantial text content suitable for downstream analysis.

Sources:
- [Nasdaq GME Earnings](https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/stocks/gme/earnings)
- [Yahoo Finance GME](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GME/)
- [Seeking Alpha GME Earnings](https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GME/earnings)
- [GameStop Investor Relations](https://investor.gamestop.com)
- [TipRanks GME](https://www.tipranks.com/stocks/gme/earnings)
